title: juncus multiflorus
intro: Juncus multiflorus, also known as the many-flowered rush or soft rush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Juncus multiflorus include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Juncus multiflorus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
